---
title: "IsoAccessR: A Lightweight R Package for Reproducible Accessibility Analysis"
author:
  - name: Tyler Muffly, MD
    orcid: 0000-0002-2044-1693
    affiliations:
      - "Denver Health and Hospital Authority"
      - "University of Colorado School of Medicine"
date: today
date-format: iso
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
bibliography: references.bib
---



{{< include proposal/00-exec-summary.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/01-signatories.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/02-problemdefinition.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/03-proposal.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/04-timeline.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/05-success.qmd >}}

::: refs
:::
